title: clinopodium debile
intro: Clinopodium debile, also known as mountain basil or weak clinopodium, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and the Indian subcontinent. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clinopodium debile include relief from digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Clinopodium debile is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
